name: Mamta Kumari
about:
Startup founders have hundreds of things to solve on their plate, and one of the most critical and toughest pieces is fundraising. Fundraising is a black box—especially for first-time founders. They spend hours and days building the right pitch deck, then hop across multiple platforms, juggling countless static databases to find the right investor.

We are solving this problem through WoodenScale AI Investment Banker—your own fundraising AI co-pilot, the only platform you need to raise capital

experiences.description:
At WoodenScale, we are building India’s first AI-native Investment Banking firm, focused on fundraising, strategic investments and M&A for early-stage startups and SMEs.

While traditional investment banks often overlook smaller deals, we leverage AI to streamline up to 80% of the process—from material preparation, Investor/buyer matching to financial analysis—enabling our bankers to focus on strategy, negotiation, and securing the best outcomes for founders.

Our mission is to make high-quality investment banking accessible to ambitious startups and SMEs, ensuring they get the right partners and fair value at every stage of their journey.

In the span of 1 year, I worked across two teams of Last Mile Delivery in Amazon. 
I worked on several features of Amazon Collect Android app which is used by shop owners to keep track of their deliveries, incentives etc. I was also instrumental in launching this app in Japan.

I also worked with IRIS team. As a part of this team, I worked on a web app which was used by Relationship Executives(One who takes care of onboarding and maintaining store owners).

I also contributed to the task of collecting raw delivery data and converting it in the format that can be used to generate reports.
Worked in Video call feature of Samsung Mobiles as an Android Developer.

posts.content: [Hiring]Research Analyst Intern/Full Time At WoodenScale AI We are building an AI Investment banker and looking for Research Analyst Intern/Full Time  to join our core team. If you love breaking down businesses, and want to work at the intersection of finance, research, and AI agents, this role is for you.We’re looking for a Research Analyst Intern to join our core startup team and help build the future of AI-powered financial intelligence for founders and investors.What you’ll work on:Build investment decks and sector research reportsCreate financial models, projections, and valuation scenariosWork alongside AI agents to improve research workflows and automate analysisCollaborate with the tech team by giving structured inputs to improve agent accuracy, reasoning, and output qualityDevelop market theses across sectors, trends, and emerging opportunitiesGenerate sharp insights for founders, investors, and internal strategyWho should apply:CFA Level 1 / Level 2 candidates or MBA students/graduatesStrong interest in public markets, private equity, VC, startups, and sectoral researchComfortable with financial statements, projections, valuation, and storytelling through decksLoves working in fast-paced startup environmentsHas extreme ownership and a strong learning mindsetWhy join us:Work directly with founder on high-impact strategic projectsLearn how AI agents are transforming investment researchGet hands-on exposure to financial intelligence systems, startup fundraising, and sector deep-dives📩 If this sounds exciting, drop a comment below and I will share the link to apply. hashtag#Hiring hashtag#Internship hashtag#ResearchAnalyst hashtag#FinanceJobs hashtag#CFA hashtag#MBA hashtag#StartupJobs hashtag#VentureCapital hashtag#FinancialModeling hashtag#AI hashtag#Startups hashtag#InvestmentResearch

🚀 We’re Hiring: AI Engineer (Backend + LLMs + Agents)At WoodenScale AI We’re building something ambitious in the AI space — and looking for a sharp AI Engineer (1–3 years experience) to join our core team and help us build from scratch.If you’re someone who doesn’t just “use AI tools” but actually builds intelligent systems, this role is for you.What you’ll work on:• Designing, building, testing and deploying AI agents end-to-end• Working deeply with LLMs (prompting, orchestration, evaluation)• Building scalable backend systems to power AI workflows• Experimenting with and implementing real-world use cases What we’re looking for:• 1–3 years of experience in backend / AI engineering• Hands-on experience with:LangChainLangGraphLangSmithLLM evaluation frameworks (LLM judges, etc.)•Strong problem-solving skills and mindset (you enjoy figuring things out from first principles)• Ability to build and ship fast in a startup environmentWhy join us:• Be part of the core tech team• Build products from 0 → 1• High ownership, high impact• ESOPs + strong growth curveIf this sounds like you (or someone you know), drop a comment below and I will share the link to apply. Let’s build something meaningful in AI 🚀

Introducing The Good Kind Foods - It is a clean-label snacking brand creating premium protein bars and cookies made with uncompromising, real ingredients—designed to deliver indulgent taste without sacrificing long-term health. The founder Manas Shrivastava is very clear about building a brand that has no "Hidden harmful ingredients", his products are already live on retail stores, Amazon, The Good Kind website and has already seen great traction and response for the products. Founders & investors, if this resonates with what you're building or investing in, feel free to connect with Manas Srivastava directly and check out The Good Kind Foods
